Build Your Career With Czar

Join a team of labour law and compliance specialists trusted by 200+ organizations across India. We're hiring driven professionals who want to make an impact.

Open Positions

Labour Law Associate

Full-TimeGurugram1–3 Yrs

Assist clients with statutory registrations, compliance audits and documentation under labour laws.

Payroll & Compliance Executive

Full-TimeDelhi0–2 Yrs

Manage end-to-end payroll processing, PF/ESIC filings and statutory returns for clients.
